update.author: Rio Vasquez
update.done_this_week: Prep work is done; kickoff of the customer-facing rollout starts Monday.
update.target_next_week: Complete the final code review and enable the feature flag globally.
update.blockers: Downstream integration test suite is flaky; may hide a regression at go-live.

update.author: Rio Vasquez
update.done_this_week: Landed 3 of 5 PRs; last two under review with a partner team.
update.target_next_week: Wrap the last integration test and hand off to QA.

update.author: Wren Nkemi
update.done_this_week: Feature flag is enabled for internal cohorts; watching latency and error rate.
update.target_next_week: Wrap the last integration test and hand off to QA.
update.blockers: Downstream integration test suite is flaky; may hide a regression at go-live.

update.author: Pia Marín
update.done_this_week: Discovered a regression in the smoke tests that pushed the merge back.
update.target_next_week: Focus on removing the current blocker; deprioritise nice-to-haves.
update.blockers: Follow-on ticket landed late; scope grew mid-sprint.

update.author: Pia Marín
update.done_this_week: Slipped the promised design review; rescheduling for later this week.
update.target_next_week: Realign with the partner team and reset the delivery date.
update.blockers: Follow-on ticket landed late; scope grew mid-sprint.

update.author: Wren Nkemi
update.done_this_week: Waiting on infra migration that was pushed to the next quarter.
update.target_next_week: Reassign to a different owner so the current one can help elsewhere.
update.blockers: External vendor SLA slipping; no eta.

email.text:
Weekly Objective Update — Beta Payments Core — Week 8

SUMMARY
- On track: 3/6
- At risk: 3 (1 red, 2 yellow)
- Not started: 0
- Done: 0
- Missing updates: 0
- Blockers / risks: 5

Hi team,

Please find the latest objective health report.

OBJECTIVE UPDATES
Sorted by status: on track, at risk, delayed, not started, missing, done.

[ON TRACK] Q1 2026 [February]: Feature flag rollout guardrails (february-2026)
Leader Engineer: Rio Vasquez
Progress: 47% | Due: 28 Feb
Link: https://example.invalid/objectives/MBETA-2602-01
Done this week: Prep work is done; kickoff of the customer-facing rollout starts Monday.
Plan for next week: Complete the final code review and enable the feature flag globally.

[ON TRACK] Q1 2026 [February]: Golden-path SLO board (february-2026)

Plan for next week: Wrap the last integration test and hand off to QA.

[ON TRACK] Q1 2026 [February]: Observability sampling refresh (february-2026)
Leader Engineer: Wren Nkemi
Progress: 54% | Due: 28 Feb
Link: https://example.invalid/objectives/MBETA-2602-03

Plan for next week: Wrap the last integration test and hand off to QA.

[AT RISK] Q1 2026 [February]: Zero-downtime restart choreography (february-2026)
Leader Engineer: Pia Marín
Progress: 35% | Due: 28 Feb

Plan for next week: Realign with the partner team and reset the delivery date.

Leader Engineer: Wren Nkemi
Progress: 22% | Due: 28 Feb

Plan for next week: Reassign to a different owner so the current one can help elsewhere.
